title: AFN Announces Keynote Speaker for 2018 Convention
summary: Anchorage, Alaska – The Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) is pleased to announce the selection of the keynote speaker for its 2018 Convention, which will take place October 18-20 at the Dena’ina Center in Anchorage, Alaska. Lt. Governor Valerie Nurr’araaluk Davidson will address the thousands of delegates and attendees at the convention on Thursday, October 18, 2018. “We are honored to welcome such an accomplished and forward-thinking Alaska...
